coordinate_system: Z-axis vertical (parallel to gravity). Flange disc HORIZONTAL in XY plane (like a tabletop). +Z = arm-side (top), -Z = workstation-side (bottom toward GIS shell). 'Horizontal' = parallel to flange face (in XY plane). 'Vertical' = perpendicular to flange face (along Z-axis). All four station modules hang vertically DOWN (-Z) from cantilever arm tips at R=65mm from rotation center.

V1.name: V1_front_iso
V1.description: Front-left isometric — closer, 50mm lens, all 4 stations visible

V2.name: V2_rear_oblique
V2.description: Rear-left oblique — back face, drive assembly visible (Z=290 matched to V1 ~27deg elevation)

V3.name: V3_side_elevation
V3.description: Low side-oblique — shows arm-to-station connections, fasteners visible

V6.name: V6_cross_section
V6.description: Quarter-cut cross-section — oblique isometric exposing two perpendicular internal faces (use render_section.py)

V7.name: V7_section_side
V7.description: XZ-plane half-cut section — rear-left oblique, exposing drive assembly internals and station mounting (use render_section.py)

view_descriptions.V6: longitudinal cross-section view (YZ plane cut, internal structures exposed)
view_descriptions.V7: lateral cross-section view (XZ plane half-cut, drive assembly and station mounting exposed)

assembly_description.V1: Center: cross-shaped dark gray flange disc (Phi90mmx25mm) lying HORIZONTAL like a tabletop. Four cantilever arms extend at 0/90/180/270 degrees, each ending in a 40mmx40mm mounting face at R=65mm from center. Below flange: thin golden amber PEEK insulation ring (Phi86mmx5mm, slightly smaller than flange). Below flange center: flat brushed adapter plate (Phi63mmx8mm) with motor+gearbox cylinder (Phi22mmx73mm) hanging down from it. Foreground (0deg arm, Applicator module, visible): Applicator housing: dark gray box (60mmx40mmx55mm), hanging DOWN from 0deg arm tip at R=65mm. gear pump cavity, scraper at bottom, NTC sensor bore; Applicator reservoir tank: brushed silver long cylinder (Phi38mmx280mm), HORIZONTAL, axis in XY plane, extending RADIALLY OUTWARD from station body. LONGEST part in assembly (280mm), M14 quick-release thread at outer end; Scraper head: tan/brownish small block (15mmx5mmx10mm), at bottom of applicator body. soft matte surface, scraper profile. Foreground (270deg arm, UHF module, visible): UHF bracket: dark gray L-bracket (50mmx40mmx25mm), mounted to 270deg arm face at R=65mm. short edge bolted to mount face, long edge extending down; UHF sensor: dark grey ABS housing cylinder (Phi45mmx60mm), vertical, sensing face DOWN. gold SMA RF connector facing UP. Background (90deg arm, AE detection module, partially occluded): Force sensor: silver aluminum flat disc (Phi42mmx12mm), horizontal disc at top of S2 stack, mounted to 90deg arm face. center wire-through hole Phi10mm; Spring limiter: silver with visible chrome coil cylindrical sleeve with internal spring (sleeve Phi12mmx14mm, spring OD 8mm), vertical axis PERPENDICULAR to flange face (along -Z), NEVER horizontal. ~6 visible turns, guide shaft Phi4mm, end plates Phi12mm; Rubber gimbal joint: matte black annular rubber joint (Phi30mmx15mm), horizontal disc connecting spring limiter to probe. flange PCD Phi22mm, 4xM2 bolts; AE probe: dark cylindrical body cylinder (Phi28mmx26mm), vertical, sensing face pointing DOWN (-Z). coaxial cable exit (3mm dia). Background (180deg arm, Cleaner module, partially occluded): Cleaner housing: dark gray tall box (50mmx40mmx120mm), hanging DOWN from 180deg arm tip at R=65mm. dual spool chambers, silicone flip-cover at bottom, tungsten counterweight (Phi14mmx13mm) at top; Solvent tank: polished silver short cylinder (Phi25mmx110mm), VERTICAL, axis parallel to Z, parallel to cleaner body. MUCH smaller than applicator tank (Phi25mm vs Phi38mm), M8 quick-release. Black cable chain arc along flange edge near 0deg position.

Assembly cut along plane exposing internal structures: pump cavities, spring limiter stack, spool chambers, gear train, motor windings, bearing cross-sections, cable routing channels.

negative_constraints: N1: Flange center hole (Phi22mm) is EMPTY — no mechanism protrudes through it toward workstation side
N2: Motor+gearbox cylinder (Phi22mmx73mm) is ONLY below flange center (in -Z direction), NEVER on workstation-side or on arm tips

N3: LONG reservoir (Phi38mmx280mm) is ALWAYS HORIZONTAL (axis in XY plane, extending radially outward); SHORT solvent tank (Phi25mmx110mm) is ALWAYS VERTICAL (axis along Z). Do NOT swap their orientations
N4: Do NOT invent or add parts not described in the design specification or not visible in the input image
N5: Signal conditioning module (GIS-EE-006) is NOT on the flange — it is mounted on the robot arm 250mm away. Do NOT draw it in end effector views
N6: PEEK ring (Phi86mm) is slightly SMALLER than flange (Phi90mm), only 5mm thin amber ring — do NOT enlarge it to match flange diameter
N7: All four station modules mount at cantilever arm TIPS (R=65mm from center), NOT on the disc face
N8: Flange disc is HORIZONTAL (like a tabletop), NOT a vertical wheel. Z-axis is vertical, flange face is in XY plane
N9: AE spring limiter axis is ALWAYS perpendicular to flange face (along -Z), NEVER parallel to flange face (NEVER horizontal)
N10: All four station modules hang vertically DOWN (-Z) from arm tips, NOT horizontally outward. Module bodies are oriented along -Z

prompt_vars.product_name: precision robotic end effector for GIS inspection

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Cross-shaped disc with 4 cantilever arms (center body Phi90mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: 7075-T6 aluminum, hard anodized dark gray, fine brushed machining marks visible, matte finish

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Thin ring below flange disc (Phi86mm, slightly smaller than flange)
material_descriptions.material_desc: PEEK engineering plastic, warm honey-amber semi-translucent, subsurface scattering glow, smooth polished
7075-T6 aluminum adapter plate, brushed dark gray, 4xM6 bolt holes visible on PCD Phi50mm

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Small cylinder below adapter plate (drive-side, Phi22mmx48mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: Dark steel motor housing (Maxon ECX 22L), black endcap, precision machined surface

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Cylinder between adapter plate and motor (drive-side, Phi22mmx25mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: Silver aluminum planetary gearbox housing (Maxon GP22C), hex output shaft visible

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Box-shaped module hanging from 0deg arm tip (60mmx40mmx55mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: Dark gray anodized aluminum housing, sharp edges, visible M3 bolt heads on mounting face

material_descriptions.visual_cue: LONG horizontal cylinder extending radially outward from 0deg station (Phi38mmx280mm, LONGEST part in assembly)
material_descriptions.material_desc: SUS316L stainless steel, brushed silver with fine linear grain, M14 quick-release thread at outer end

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Small brownish piece at bottom of applicator module
material_descriptions.material_desc: Tan/brownish silicone rubber scraper head, soft matte surface

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Silver disc at top of S2 serial stack (Phi42mmx12mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: KWR42 six-axis force/torque sensor, silver aluminum body, center wire-through hole Phi10mm

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Cylindrical sleeve with visible coil spring (sleeve Phi12mmx14mm, spring OD 8mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: Aluminum spring limiter sleeve with visible tight helix compression coil spring (~6 visible turns, OD 8mm), Phi4mm chrome guide shaft, end plates Phi12mm

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Black rubber annular joint below spring limiter (Phi30mmx15mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: NBR rubber universal gimbal joint, matte black, Shore A 40

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Cylindrical sensor at bottom of S2 stack (Phi28mmx26mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: TWAE-03 acoustic emission sensor, dark cylindrical body, coaxial cable exit

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Tall box-shaped module hanging from 180deg arm tip (50mmx40mmx120mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: Dark gray anodized aluminum housing, dual spool chambers inside, silicone rubber flip-cover at bottom cleaning window, tungsten counterweight (Phi14mmx13mm) at module top

material_descriptions.visual_cue: SHORT vertical cylinder on 180deg station side wall (Phi25mmx110mm, MUCH smaller than applicator tank)
material_descriptions.material_desc: SUS304 stainless steel, polished silver, mounted vertically parallel to cleaner body axis
Dark gray 7075-T6 aluminum L-bracket, short edge bolted to mounting face, long edge extending down

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Cylindrical sensor clamped by UHF L-bracket (Phi45mmx60mm)
material_descriptions.material_desc: I300-UHF-GT inspection sensor, dark grey ABS housing, gold SMA RF connector facing UP

material_descriptions.visual_cue: Black O-ring seated in groove on flange (Phi80mmx2.4mm section)
material_descriptions.material_desc: FKM fluoroelastomer, matte black, Shore A 70 hardness appearance

components._source: docs/design/04-末端执行机构设计.md §4.8 BOM

standard_parts.visual_cue: Small cylinder (Phi22mmx48mm) — motor body below adapter plate
standard_parts.real_part: Maxon ECX SPEED 22L brushed DC motor, silver aluminum cylindrical housing, black plastic endcap with thin cable
Maxon GP22C planetary gearbox, silver machined aluminum housing, hex output shaft visible on top
DIN 2093 A6 disc spring washer stack, blued spring steel, slight iridescent golden-blue tint

standard_parts.visual_cue: Small annular rings (Phi10mmx4mm) at bearing locations
standard_parts.real_part: MR105ZZ miniature ball bearing, chrome steel races with rubber seals, precise metallic finish

standard_parts.visual_cue: Black rubber torus ring (Phi80mmx2.4mm section) on flange sealing surface
standard_parts.real_part: FKM O-ring, matte black fluoroelastomer, soft rubber appearance

standard_parts.visual_cue: Silver disc sensor (Phi42mmx12mm) at S2 station top
standard_parts.real_part: KWR42 six-axis force/torque sensor, silver aluminum body, precision instrument
TWAE-03 acoustic emission sensor, dark body, coaxial cable connector

standard_parts.visual_cue: Small cylindrical connectors (Phi10-12mm) on module sides
standard_parts.real_part: LEMO push-pull connectors, chrome-plated brass body, colored coding ring, precision round plug

standard_parts.visual_cue: LONG horizontal cylinder (Phi38mmx280mm) at S1 station (LONGEST part, HORIZONTAL)
standard_parts.real_part: Stainless steel solvent reservoir tank, mirror-polished SUS316L, welded end caps, industrial vessel look

standard_parts.visual_cue: Box shape with pipe stubs at S1 applicator
standard_parts.real_part: Miniature gear pump, silver aluminum body, two barbed tube fittings, compact industrial pump

standard_parts.visual_cue: Large cylindrical sensor (Phi45mmx60mm) at S4 UHF station
standard_parts.real_part: I300-UHF inspection sensor, dark grey ABS housing, front aperture window, industrial sensor module

labels._doc: Only visible components per view. Coords at 1920x1080 ref, auto-scaled.
